title: O on the floor
goal: Hard drop the O piece flat onto the open floor.

acceptedSolutions.label: O on the floor
acceptedSolutions.explanation: Empty board; O locks at engine origin x=4, y=0 (its 2x2 footprint covers columns 4-5 of rows 0-1).

title: I flat on the bottom
goal: Place the I piece flat along the bottom of the field.

acceptedSolutions.label: I flat on the bottom
acceptedSolutions.explanation: At x=3 y=-1 r=0 the I occupies (3,0),(4,0),(5,0),(6,0) — a flat 4-wide row resting on the floor. The SRS local grid floats the horizontal I one row above its origin, so the grounded origin is y=-1.

title: L into the left wall
goal: Tuck the L piece against the left wall.

acceptedSolutions.label: L in the left corner
acceptedSolutions.explanation: At x=0 y=-1 r=0 the L occupies (0,0),(1,0),(2,0),(2,1): flat bottom of three cells resting on the floor with the toe in column 2 row 1, flush against the left wall. The SRS local grid floats the L one row above its origin, so the grounded origin is y=-1.

title: J into the right wall
goal: Tuck the J piece against the right wall.

acceptedSolutions.label: J in the right corner
acceptedSolutions.explanation: At x=7 y=-1 r=0 the J occupies (7,0),(8,0),(9,0),(7,1): flat bottom of three cells resting on the floor with the toe in column 7 row 1, flush against the right wall. The SRS local grid floats the J one row above its origin, so the grounded origin is y=-1.

title: T on top of a flat I
goal: Drop the T centered on top of a flat I floor.

acceptedSolutions.label: T centered above the I
acceptedSolutions.explanation: At x=3 y=0 r=0 the T occupies (3,1),(4,1),(5,1),(4,2): the flat bottom rests on the I floor, the nub points up from column 4 of row 2.
